name: SAIGAITON: DAIRASEN NO BAKUHATSU KYU (DISASTER RELEASE: VIOLENT SPIRALING EXPLOSION SPHERE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton, Katon)

Rank: 2

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 32 | Successes: 6

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H, E, Mas (See Text)

The Dairasen no Bakuhatsu Kyu utilizes advanced chakra manipulation in conjunction with the Rasengan to create an explosive, multi-elemental version of the normal Rasengan technique. This technique requires the user to form a whirling ball of chakra imbued with fire and wind in his hand, and thrust it towards an enemy. The user makes a melee touch attack with the technique that, if it connects, deals 7d8 force damage plus 5d6 damage, half of which is fire and the other half wind. The target will be pushed backwards a number of feet equal to half the force damage, rounded to the nearest 5foot unit. Then the target must succeed a Reflex save (as per the technique) or else be caught in a 20-foot radius vortex of wind and fire that deals an additional 2d6 slashing damage and ends in an explosion within the same proximity that deals 2d6 fire damage. Any creature in the affected area must also make a Reflex save to avoid being caught in the vortex and explosion.

Using this technique will form the Dairasen no Bakuhatsu Kyu only. Attacking with it is an attack action, but can also be part of a full-attack action. The technique will be discharged when used, regardless whether it hit or not. In the event the user misses, the Dairasen no Bakuhatsu Kyu will not form a vortex, but will explode in a 20-foot radius burst from the point of origin that deals 6d6 fire damage to all creatures in the affected area, which can be halved with a successful Reflex save. The user is unable to make a Reflex save in this case, and must instead succeed a Fortitude save to half the damage and avoid falling prone. The user can hold onto the Dairasen no Bakuhatsu Kyu for 1 round per 3 levels before it dissipates, if not used beforehand.

Requires: Rasengan (5)

Effect: Creates 1 Rasen no Bakuhatsu

Empower: The user may spend 1 point of chakra to increase the force damage dealt by 1, maximum 1d8 per level or 18d8. The user may also spend an additional 1

point of chakra to increase the elemental damage by 1, maximum 1 die per level or 12d6. This does not apply to the vortex or subsequent explosion. The perform requirements increase by 1 for every 2 additional damage die.

Mastery: At fifth step of mastery, the user may choose to dissipate the technique in the event he misses his target and the technique would discharge by making a Chakra Control check (DC 20 + each point of chakra spent empowering the technique) as a free action.
